prompt: Can you check the Functional Areas for any people references that should be linked? I think the engineering_leader fields are all just plain text names.

assertions.description: Respects the user's scope constraint to Functional Areas only
assertions.check: output focuses on Functional Areas directory, does not audit Strategies/ or other top-level dirs

assertions.description: Identifies the ~35 engineering_leader fields with plain-text names
assertions.check: output lists at least 25 engineering_leader fields as unlinked

assertions.description: For people who already have People files, proposes markdown link with correct relative path
assertions.check: output shows correct relative path syntax (e.g. ../../People/ianderson.md) for known people

assertions.description: For people without People files, proposes creating them or flags as needing creation
assertions.check: output identifies people needing new People files and suggests userid-based filenames

assertions.description: Detects data quality problems like double-space typo, GAP placeholder, (Interim) annotation
assertions.check: output flags at least 2 of: double-space typo in Sruthi Samraj, GAP vacancy marker, Neena Ballard (Interim)
